title: Crystal Speed
description: Allows you to change the crystal rotation speed and add little orbit crystals that can also spin fast works with crystal opacity mod
body:
**Crystal Speed**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow)
--- Let's you change the crystal rotation speed with per part settings and allows you to render more parts of the crystal or skip rendering for parts you can also change the bounce speed of the crystal and it includes some extra options And theres a orbit tab in settings to spawn little crystals that orbit around the crystal and you can change the amount rotation speeds on those and the direction it goes + speed it rotates at. to disable that you can just turn the amount to 0 - Outer glass rotation speed - Inner glass rotation speed - Core rotation speed - and more. Get my other mod that makes crystals see through [Crystal Opacity](https://modrinth.com/mod/crystal-opacity) crystal rotation idea from [Custom End Crystals](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-end-crystals) adding more unique features later on. # Requires **WILL NOT WORK WITHOUT:** - Silicon: [Silicon](https://modrinth.com/mod/silicons) - Mod Menu: [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - YACL: [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) ---
--- **1.18.4 - 1.17.3 fabric loader** [![Follow me!](https://img.shields.io/badge/Follow%20me!-💕-pink?style=flat)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow) [![NameMC](https://img.shields.io/badge/namemc-cutebow-ffb6c1?style=flat&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow)
